docs.title: FastAuth
docs.text:
Ready-to-use customizable lib for FastAPI with Authentication, OAuth2, RBAC and User management, with rich ORM support

  • Documentation: https://astralmortem.github.io/fastauth/
  • Source code: https://github.com/AstralMortem/fastauth

Quickly add registration, authentication and authorization system to your FastAPI project. FastAuth designed and to be customizable, and highly inspired by another Auth systems:

  • FastAPIUsers
  • AuthX

docs.title: Features
docs.text:
• Authentication support:
    • Access and Refresh token dependency
    • Ready to use register, login, reset password and verify e-mail routes
    • Ready to use OAuth2 login flow
  • Authorization support:
    • RBAC Dependency
    • Ready to user permissions and roles routes
  • ORM Support:
    • Extensible base user, roles, permissions models
    • SQLAlchemy ORM async
    • Beanie ODM
